ab: Yupas, ungat uwaw micyu sali la, usa mabaziy uwaw micyu.
ch: W:Yupas，家裡沒有米酒了，你去買米酒。
en: Yupas, our home is out of rice wine, please go and buy some.

ab: kiya utux yuyut ki i pahapuyan, ka baziy la.
ch: M:廚房裡還有一瓶，不用買吧!
en: There is still one bottle left in the kitchen, so there is no need to buy one!

ab: ini katana utux yuyut, usa mabaziy lawziy su sazing yuyut han.
ch: W:一瓶不夠，再去買兩瓶回來。
en: One bottle is not enough for me, go and buy two more back.

ab: pabaziy kung su uwaw miyu, niya simu tabaziy aw?
ch: M:我要買米酒，你們有賣嗎?
en: I am looking for rice wine. Do you have any rice wine?

ab: kiyan ay! musa pisa ku banasun su?
en: Yes! How many bottles do you need?

ab: pabaziy kung su sazing yuyut, ru pabaziy kung lawziy su utux yubing buwax.
ch: M:我要買兩瓶，還要買一包米。
en: I want two bottles and a pack of rice.

ab: niya haniy ku bawax, kiyan ku banasun su na aw?
ch: W:米在這裡，你還需要什麼嗎?
en: Here is the rice, what else do you need?

ab: pabaziy kung su batu na, kiyan simu aw?
en: I want some eggs too, do you have some?

ab: wayan miyan masu’un tabaziy laku batu la.
en: We are out of eggs.

ab: pabaziy kung su latan.
en: I want to buy some clothes.

ab: musa maha nanu ku kakusa niya pi?
en: What kind of clothes do you like?

ab: pabaziy kung su ra’atung uzit na latan.
en: I want to buy the clothes with short sleeves.

ab: maha nanu ku matanah haniy hiya ?
en: How about this red one?

ab: kiyan ku natas binah iru na aw?
en: Do you have another color?

ab: kiyan ku iru pala’uw ru masingaw iru miyan na.
en: We have white and blue ones too.

ab: bi’iy kung su utux na masingaw iru latan.
ch: M:請給我一件藍色的衣服。
en: Please give me the clothes in blue.

ab: Yumin manuwah su inu sawni? nuwah su mayuy ?
ch: W:Yumin你剛剛去哪裡了?你去運動嗎?
en: Yumin, where have you been just now? Did you go exercising?

ab: ayat, manuwah kung ramaw tabaziy tabihiy ni yaki mu .
en: No, I went grocery shopping for my grandma.

ab: han , kiyan hari su malahangan aw ? muwah su gamalu kuzing masu’un kagabiy aw!
ch: W:這樣啊，你晚上有沒有空?要不要和我一起吃飯！
en: No wonder! Are you available at night? Would you like to have a meal with me?

ab: ayat yu , musa kuzing mabaziy su latan.
en: No, I want to buy some clothes.

ab: nanu u, hala kung gamaluw isu.
en: Then, I will go with you.

ab: lawkah su ga, pa’usay misu pisa pila ku utux bahun tabihi hani?
ch: M:你好，請問這把菜多少錢?
en: Hello, how much is this bunch of vegetables?

ab: utux bahun tabihi hani ga mapusan pila.
en: The vegetables are $20 for a bunch.

ab: pisa pila ku ngahi hani?
en: How much are these sweet potatoes?

ab: utux tanatin ngahi hani ga matayun pila.
en: Sweet potatoes are thirty dollars for a pound.

ab: bi’iy kung su sazing bahun tabihi ru utux tanatin ngahi.
ch: M:請給我兩把菜和一斤地瓜。
en: Please give me two bunches of vegetables and a pound of sweet potatoes.
